form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split and went on to clock 29.77 when a 1.5 lengths winner over 520m at this track. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split and went on to clock 29.77 when a 1.5 lengths winner over 520m at this track. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th on April 9 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Fascinate Samuel beaten 13 lengths (30.20) in a NG. Placed two back at Wentworth Park. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but she goes well over this track and distance with three wins from five starts. Capable of a good showing.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at Sandown when a 4 length third but did clock a slick 29.57 over the 515m journey. Harder here and one for the multiples.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was among the placegetters latest at Sandown when a 4 length third but did clock a slick 29.57 over the 515m journey. Harder here and one for the multiples.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked off and collided turning into back straight.
Checked turning out of back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when eighth and beaten 12 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Needs to find best and prepared to watch this time.

form.formComment: Last start failed to finish the race over 520m at Wentworth Park on April 11. Generally about the mark but can't recommend her in this.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.17) when fourth over 520m at Wentworth Park in a Grade 5. Starts from box 7 for the first time here. Can feature in the finish.
